title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Jim Chang - Chain Abstraction with the OIF
description:
Jim Chang (LI.FI, Head of Product) introduces and demostrates of the Open Intents Framework (OIF) and two net-new pieces of its chain abstraction capabilities: Resource Locks and Multichain Inputs.

Talk given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
